info.name: Primavera WebAPI Collections
info.description: Primavera.WebAPI collection is for testing all the power and capability of the API developed at Primavera BSS.

request.description: In this token is necessary to pass the username, password and company, to have full access to Api capability

header.description: Used in response to a preflight request to indicate which HTTP headers can be used when making the actual request.
Specifies the method or methods allowed when accessing the resource. This is used in response to a preflight request.
Specifies a URI that may access the resource. For requests without credentials, the server may specify '*' as a wildcard, thereby allowing any origin to access the resource.
Tells all caching mechanisms from server to client whether they may cache this object. It is measured in seconds
The length of the response body in octets (8-bit bytes)
The mime type of this content
The date and time that the message was sent
Gives the date/time after which the response is considered stale
Implementation-specific headers that may have various effects anywhere along the request-response chain.
A name for the server
Specifies the technology (ASP.NET, PHP, JBoss, e.g.) supporting the web application (version details are often in X-Runtime, X-Version, or X-AspNet-Version)

response.name: Token Request
response.body:
Erro de servidor na aplicação '/WebApi'.

Erro em tempo de execução

Descrição: Erro de aplicação no servidor. As definições de erro personalizadas atuais desta aplicação impedem que os detalhes do erro da aplicação sejam visualizados em modo remoto (por motivos de segurança). No entanto, estes poderão ser visualizados pelos browsers em execução no servidor local.

Detalhes: Para permitir que os detalhes desta mensagem de erro específica possam ser visualizados em computadores remotos, crie uma tag <customErrors> num ficheiro de configuração 'web.config' localizado no diretório raiz da aplicação Web atual. Em seguida, o atributo 'mode' desta tag <customErrors> deverá ser definido para 'Off'. 


<!-- Ficheiro de Configuração Web.Config -->

<configuration>
    <system.web>
        <customErrors mode="Off"/>
    </system.web>
</configuration>

Notas: A página de erro atual pode ser substituída por uma página de erro personalizada através da modificação do atributo 'defaultRedirect' da tag de configuração <customErrors> da aplicação, de modo a apontar para um URL de página de erro personalizada. 


<!-- Ficheiro de Configuração Web.Config -->

<configuration>
    <system.web>
        <customErrors mode="RemoteOnly" defaultRedirect="mycustompage.htm"/>
    </system.web>
</configuration>

request.description: This first token request, just insert your username and password.
This first token request, just insert your username and password.

header.description: Used in response to a preflight request to indicate which HTTP headers can be used when making the actual request.
Specifies the method or methods allowed when accessing the resource. This is used in response to a preflight request.
Specifies a URI that may access the resource. For requests without credentials, the server may specify '*' as a wildcard, thereby allowing any origin to access the resource.
Tells all caching mechanisms from server to client whether they may cache this object. It is measured in seconds
The length of the response body in octets (8-bit bytes)
The mime type of this content
The date and time that the message was sent
Gives the date/time after which the response is considered stale
Implementation-specific headers that may have various effects anywhere along the request-response chain.
A name for the server
Custom header
Specifies the technology (ASP.NET, PHP, JBoss, e.g.) supporting the web application (version details are often in X-Runtime, X-Version, or X-AspNet-Version)
